title: psilocarphus tenellus var. tenuis
intro: Psilocarphus tenellus var. tenuis, also known as slender rosinweed, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing pain and swelling, and it may also have antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Psilocarphus tenellus var. tenuis, often in the form of teas or infusions, are sometimes used to support respiratory health and soothe digestive issues.
